nasb.text: he said, “I will give you a hearing after your accusers arrive also,” giving orders for him to be kept in Herod’s Praetorium.

esv.text: he said, “I will give you a hearing when your accusers arrive.” And he commanded him to be guarded in Herod’s praetorium.

cnv.text: 就說：“等到原告也來了，我才審問你。”於是吩咐人把他拘留在希律的王府裡。

ccb.text: “等告你的人来了，我会审理你的案子。”于是下令把保罗关在希律的王府里。

csbs.text: 就说：“等你的原告们也到了，我会详细地听你的事。”他下令把保罗看守在希律的王府里。
